title: Hotfix: guard test_complexity_key_collision import behind radon (un-red main)
intent: PR #164 added tests/test_complexity_key_collision.py, which imports app.ci.check_complexity at module top. That module calls sys.exit(2) at import time when radon is missing. radon is installed only for the debt-gate job, not for the general pytest environments (api-verify, Core CI), so importing it during pytest collection aborts the whole session with an INTERNALERROR. This greened the debt gates but red'd api-verify and Core CI on main. Fix: pytest.importorskip('radon') before the import so the module is skipped where radon is absent and runs where it is present. Test-only; no product behavior change, no runtime path touched.

diff_articulation.what_changed: test_complexity_key_collision.py: add `import pytest; pytest.importorskip('radon')` immediately before `from app.ci.check_complexity import check_complexity` (now `# noqa: E402`). When radon is installed (debt-gate job, local services/api/.venv) the test runs exactly as before; when radon is absent (api-verify, Core CI) the module is skipped at collection instead of crashing pytest with the module-level sys.exit(2) in check_complexity.py.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Without this guard the suite cannot even be collected in any environment that lacks the dev-only radon dependency: check_complexity.py performs `try: from radon.complexity import cc_visit; except ImportError: sys.exit(2)` at import time, and the new test is the only collection-time importer of that module. importorskip converts the hard collection abort into a clean per-module skip, restoring api-verify and Core CI to green while preserving the collision-guard assertion wherever radon exists.

commands_run: services/api/.venv: pytest tests/test_complexity_key_collision.py -q -> 2 passed (radon present; behavior unchanged)
reasoning: with radon absent, module-level pytest.importorskip('radon') raises Skipped at collection, so the subsequent check_complexity import never executes and the suite collects cleanly
python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py --base origin/main --head HEAD -> PASS (changed files declared in scope)
